parameters: \n<Babs>Welcome to my \c[18]Lewd Gallery\c[0],\. Knight!\.\. I currently have \c[18]lots of animations from Princess & Conquest\c[0] for you to try out with me!
\n<Babs>So...\.\.\. Are you ready to experiment with me?
\n<Babs>I can transform in anything you want,\. let's run a couple "tests" together~\!
\n<Dear>You want \c[18]hundreds\c[0] of hours of lewd adventures?
\n<Dear>Too bad~!\.\. This is just the Gallery client!
\n<Dear>You should get the actual game,\. it has a whole Kingdom of adventures and Princesses to save!\.\. You know you can't resist!
\n<Dear>That's cool,\. Knight~\.\. Keep having fun with the witch~\.\. My lady will be waiting for you in the full game!
Kobold Princess' artworks artworks have been unlocked in the Gallery!
Wyvern Princess' artworks have been unlocked in the Gallery!
Slime Princess' artworks have been unlocked in the Gallery!
Goblin Princess' artworks artworks have been unlocked in the Gallery!
Dragon Princess I's artworks artworks have been unlocked in the Gallery!
\n<Babs>Oh!\.\. That's the \c[18]CG \ii[5]\c[0],\. Knight!\.\. There's a collection of \c[18]illustrations from Princess & Conquest\c[0] in there!
\n<Babs>Check around the room to unlock them all!
